title: Kryptostoma tosariense
taxonomy: Kryptostoma tosariense is a type of extinct genus of planktic foraminifera. The classification of Kryptostoma tosariense falls under the domain Eukarya, kingdom Protista, and phylum Rhizaria. It is further classified as a class Foraminifera and an order Rotaliina. Within the order Rotaliina, Kryptostoma tosariense is classified as a family Globigerinidae and a genus Kryptostoma. The species tosariense is a member of this genus.
